highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 1.58.1 is a servicing update on the 1.58 line with a small Skia refresh.

breaking.title: GRContextOptions loses DisableDistanceFieldPaths and ForceSoftwarePathMasks
breaking.body: The `DisableDistanceFieldPaths` and `ForceSoftwarePathMasks` properties on `GRContextOptions` were removed upstream. Callers should drop the assignments — path rendering picks the right strategy automatically.
